meta.title: ICS Anomaly Detection Panel
meta.description:
Dale Peterson moderated a panel with Damiano Bolzoni of Security Matters, Andrea Carcano of Nozomi Networks, and Patrick McBride of Claroty, 

Primary Question: How should an owner / operator who wants to purchase an ICS anomaly detection solution select the best solution from 20+ offerings?

1:00 Definition of ICS Anomaly Detection
5:00 Companies in the ICS Anomaly Detection space
7:25 At what stage in an ICS security program should an asset owner consider ICS anomaly detection
14:20 How should an asset owner select between the 20+ solutions (the answers are only of limited help)
20:00 Most of the solutions are rules based and not learning baselines and identifying variances.
23:00 Financial and stability considerations in selecting a vendor that will be around in the future
27:20 Demo or evaluate with your protocol / pcap and active v. passive approach
31:40 What are the ongoing operational costs to effectively use this type of detection solution?
44:42 What can we expect from this product category in the next 2-5 years?
